description: You are a wildlife biologist extracting rare bird calls from a continuous field recording. Based on the field notes at /home/ga/Audio/field_notes.txt, extract the three specified timestamp ranges from the 'Raw Canopy' track into a new track named 'Target Species'. Mute the 'Raw Canopy' track, boost the 'Target Species' track volume by +6 dB, and export the isolated calls to /home/ga/Audio/bioacoustics_export/isolated_calls.wav.
